creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #3)

The "small improvement" is still being discussed by c-ares (https://github.com/c-ares/c-ares/pull/417), most likely it will produce another version bump, and we'll update accordingly.

In the meantime, for node, the workaround seems to be to include the private header, outside the scope of c-ares (https://github.com/nodejs/node/pull/39739). The bugzilla-submitted node patches reflect this arguably ugly hack.

Again, it will likely produce another version bump for node, we should remove the extra file, and go back to normal.

Thank you for keeping an eye on this issue!
